behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all key identifiers: us_internal_drain_ready_polls, us_loop_t, epoll_kqueue.c, internal.h, LIBUS_MAX_READY_POLLS, bun_epoll_pwait2, kevent64, KEVENT_FLAG_IMMEDIATE, us_internal_dispatch_ready_polls, us_loop_run, us_loop_run_bun_tick, drain counter 48, and zero timespec {0,0}.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md dictates the exact implementation: function signature, counter value 48, `--drain_count` pattern, saturation check `num_ready_polls == LIBUS_MAX_READY_POLLS`, `struct timespec zero = {0, 0}`, and KEVENT_FLAG_IMMEDIATE — this is prescriptive fix specification, not just describing the bug.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific details: exact function name `us_internal_drain_ready_polls`, counter initialization regex `int ... count... = \d+`, `--count` decrement pattern, and `num_ready_polls == LIBUS_MAX_READY_POLLS` literal — alternative valid implementations (e.g., using a for loop, different counter name, or different saturation check) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are regex/substring inspection of the C source file (_read_source, re.search) with no compilation or execution — the task description even acknowledges 'the usockets code ... cannot be compiled independently'.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub that just adds an empty function would fail test_drain_logic_implemented, test_drain_uses_zero_timeout, test_drain_has_iteration_cap, and test_drain_checks_saturation.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all behaviors named in instruction: drain function signature, saturation check, zero timeout, iteration cap with counter 48 pattern, replacement of 1024 with LIBUS_MAX_READY_POLLS, and drain-after-dispatch ordering.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers ('Gates', 'Fail-to-pass') and each has docstrings describing intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies C source, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths (packages/bun-usockets/src/eventing/epoll_kqueue.c, internal.h) and identifiers match between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact file `packages/bun-usockets/src/eventing/epoll_kqueue.c` and the exact functions to modify (`us_loop_run`, `us_loop_run_bun_tick`), and even prescribes the new function name and counter value — eliminating localization work.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
